description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:6 Docker image. Define a single deploy stage with a job named publish that runs only on tag pushes or pipeline triggers. In the publish job, write the NPM authentication token to .npmrc with `echo '//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${NPM_TOKEN}' > .npmrc`, then execute `npm install`, `npm run build`, and finally `npm publish --access=public`. The job should reference the secret variable NPM_TOKEN and has no caches, artifacts, or services.
